description_long: This is a classic beige Volkswagen Beetle with a rounded, compact body and a distinctively curved roofline. The car features chrome bumpers at both the front and rear, round headlights, and a simple, vintage design. The windows are slightly tinted, and the side mirrors are small and mounted on the doors. The wheels are steel with chrome hubcaps, and the car has two passenger doors on each side. The rear engine compartment is subtly indicated by the vented panel at the back, and the license plate is mounted centrally on both the front and rear bumpers. The overall appearance is slightly weathered, suggesting regular use in an urban environment.
description: A beige, vintage Volkswagen Beetle with chrome bumpers, round headlights, and a compact, rounded body. The car has a slightly weathered look and classic design details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the curved back, rear window, chrome bumper, and central license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two doors, rounded fenders, and chrome hubcaps.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded hood, circular headlights, chrome bumper, and front license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the two doors, side mirror, and wheel details.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual round headlights, single arrangement, classic chrome bezel
